0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"FTS5 Search"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"SQLite's built-in full-text search engine for exact term matching, boolean queries, and prefix search."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Capabilities"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Term matching"}],": Exact word and phrase search"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Boolean logic"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"AND"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"OR"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"NOT"}]," operators"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Prefix search"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"data*"}]," matches \"database\", \"datastore\""]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Column filtering"}],": Search specific fields"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Ranking"}],": BM25-based relevance scoring"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Query Syntax"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Simple term\nresults = mem.text_search(\"database\")\n\n# Phrase (exact sequence)\nresults = mem.text_search('\"machine learning\"')\n\n# Boolean\nresults = mem.text_search(\"deployment AND kubernetes\")\nresults = mem.text_search(\"python OR golang\")\nresults = mem.text_search(\"database NOT mongodb\")\n\n# Prefix\nresults = mem.text_search(\"auth*\")\n\n# Column filter\nresults = mem.text_search(\"tags:production database\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"BM25 Ranking"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"FTS5 uses BM25 for relevance scoring:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"score = log(N / df) * (f * (k1 + 1)) / (f + k1 * (1 - b + b * dl / avgdl))\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Where:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"N"}],": Total documents"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"df"}],": Documents containing term"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"f"}],": Term frequency in document"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"dl"}],": Document length"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"avgdl"}],": Average document length"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Integration with Hybrid Search"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"FTS5 scores are normalized and fused with vector scores:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# FTS5 contributes 30% to final score by default\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"database migration strategy\",\n  text_weight=0.3,\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Performance"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"| Query Type | Latency | Use Case |\n|------------|---------|----------|\n| Single term | 5ms | Quick lookup |\n| Phrase | 8ms | Exact match |\n| Boolean | 12ms | Complex filter |\n| Prefix | 15ms | Autocomplete |"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Index Schema"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE working_fts USING fts5(\n  content,\n  tags,\n  source,\n  content_rowid=rowid\n);\n","language":"sql"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"FTS5 indices are maintained automatically via triggers on the main tables."}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"SQLite Version"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"FTS5 requires SQLite 3.45 or higher. Mnemosyne checks this at initialization and raises a clear error if your SQLite version is too old."}]}]]}]]}]}]],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/06qv3~~e._cb6.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-1",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0ch_p3vkb0uw2.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-2",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0fekzj03ltn5y.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-3",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0pqew2nbfoy2f.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-4",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/07.05twov8012.js","async":true}],"$L4","$L5","$L6","$L7","$L8"],"$L9"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"QQSqVRZ0L1fJQFST1lZ0f"}
